hinweis: Read-only result of a daily run. Recommendations are verification steps (watch, check_source, escalate_human), not trades. Backend: mock.

faelle.empfehlung_grund: Low band or review completed -- keep watching only, no action needed.
faelle.begruendung: Market: 'Will China invade Taiwan by end of 2026?'. Trigger: concentration. Classification: severity high, 100th percentile, 1 signal family(ies). Concentration patterns: market concentration, same theme repeated positions. event context not evaluated. Reference pattern: partial overlap. Status: human review pending. 5 verification steps open. The cue may be a BUY-only filter artifact; without exit/position data it is not a directional signal.
